Designing calm experiences for complex systems.

Product Designer based in Istanbul. I design clear, scalable product experiences for fintech ecosystems and multi-client products across web and mobile, from discovery to delivery.

About & Skills

Engineer who found her way to design.

Background

I trained as an industrial engineer and spent five years designing warehouse layouts and logistics systems at CEVA. Optimising flows for forklifts turned out to be useful preparation for optimising flows for humans on a screen.

In 2022, I formalised the switch through Userspots' UX program, then worked across fintech, telecom, crypto, and healthcare clients. Today I am the sole UX designer for a startup fintech ecosystem.

How I work

Discovery to delivery. I run interviews, audit systems, build components, ship prototypes, and stay close to engineering until the work is live. I like design systems because they make routine decisions once, so better product decisions can happen often.

Teaching

Guest lecturer at Istanbul Technical University, mentor at Brick Institute, and published in the UX Collective Bootcamp on Medium. I also coached an Anadolu Group team to a first-place idea competition finish in 2024.
